Global Variable# kIMKScrollingGridCandidatePanel

macOS 10.5+

```
var kIMKScrollingGridCandidatePanel: Int { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/inputmethodkit/kimkscrollinggridcandidatepanel#Discussion)

A window that displays a grid and can scroll if necessary.
